text:
Once upon an autumn eve. There lived a lonely owl named Olive.

One day she heard little mice gossiping about somebody special.

"Oh, they say owl number three."

Olive tilted her head. Maybe she'd like them.

She tried speaking. "Hi."

They screeched fast.

"No. No you donquires."

One night she flew near their hole.

"Anyway. You'd kind?"

They murmured together.

"That's no nice thing."

Maybe she'd stay.

She settled nearby. They didn’t notice.

Months rolled by.

She knew a thing or two.

"Oh, I like cheese."

Maybe they'd keep cheese.

They did. For many moons.

One day. They thought.

"You remember?"

Olive thought.

"You know?"

She found.

"I love you."

She whispered.

That's enough. That's true. Forever.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
